source.assumptions: 9-max MTT, BB ante, ~2.2bb opens, 3x 3-bets IP / 4x OOP. Single-bet, single-raiser scenarios. Frequencies approximate modern GTO consensus per texture.
source.description: Compact flop training library covering 4 preflop scenarios × 3 depths × 9 board textures × 2 decision points.

spots.coachingNote: The preflop raiser's range hits top pair more often. C-bet small and often.

history: Preflop raiser bets 1/3 pot. Action on you.
spots.coachingNote: The preflop raiser's range hits top pair more often. C-bet small and often.
Caller's range catches up here. Mix in checks — not a pure range bet board.

history: Preflop raiser bets 1/3 pot. Action on you.
spots.coachingNote: Caller's range catches up here. Mix in checks — not a pure range bet board.
Both ranges have many made hands and draws. Bet smaller, check more — range advantage is thinner.

history: Preflop raiser bets 1/3 pot. Action on you.
spots.coachingNote: Both ranges have many made hands and draws. Bet smaller, check more — range advantage is thinner.
Flushes already exist; bare overpairs lose value. Check more.

history: Preflop raiser bets 1/3 pot. Action on you.
spots.coachingNote: Flushes already exist; bare overpairs lose value. Check more.
Strong c-bet board — preflop raiser benefits from charging draws.

history: Preflop raiser bets 1/3 pot. Action on you.
spots.coachingNote: Strong c-bet board — preflop raiser benefits from charging draws.
Most ranges miss; check more often. When betting, size small for thin value.

Range advantage flop. Pairs and overcards dominate. Bet small for cheap protection.
